title: polystichum proliferum
intro: Polystichum proliferum, also known as the fan-shaped fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum proliferum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and processing the fronds, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or supplements.
